description_long: This is a dark metallic helmet with a rounded dome and extended cheek guards, reminiscent of historical or fantasy armor. The helmet features intricate embossed patterns along the central ridge and lower edge, with Celtic or Norse-inspired knotwork and decorative motifs. The surface has a slightly worn, matte finish, suggesting frequent use or age, and the metal appears robust and solid. The cheek guards are integrated into the main structure and display engraved designs, adding to the ornate appearance. There are no visible ventilation holes, visors, or modern fastenings, giving it a traditional, medieval look. The interior is not visible, but it is likely lined with leather or padding for comfort.
description: A dark, ornate metal helmet with embossed Celtic or Norse patterns and extended cheek guards, featuring a matte, aged finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the central embossed ridge, symmetrical cheek guards, and detailed knotwork on the forehead.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the rounded dome, engraved cheek guard, and decorative band along the lower edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth curvature of the helmet and the continuation of the central embossed pattern.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the engraved cheek guard and the helmet's robust, rounded profile.
attribute_graphic_design: Embossed Celtic or Norse knotwork and decorative motifs along the central ridge and cheek guards.
